title: Shikshan Mantra OS content-backend client configuration
description: JSON Schema for /etc/shikshan/backend.yml. Frozen by ADR-0017 (content backend architecture). OS-side (client) config for reaching the phase-1 content backend over the host-only network. Mirrors the auth.yml backend.* convention (ADR-0009).

url.description: Backend base URL. MUST be https — TLS is pinned via ca_cert_path, no system-store trust. Default host-only address per ADR-0017: https://192.168.56.20:8443

ca_cert_path.description: Absolute path to the pinned CA cert that signed the backend's server cert (distributed from the backend VM, SMO-0701). e.g. /etc/shikshan/backend-ca.crt

timeout_ms.description: Request timeout in milliseconds. The SMO-0705 /health round-trip gate requires the response in < 1000 ms.
